body_transformation: The compact stone body now appears as a translucent, semi-liquid obsidian with faint internal energy currents visible beneath its surface. Rounded head shape retains its form but now glows with a deep violet mist within hollow eye sockets, while stubby limbs remain firmly planted yet appear to flicker with ghostly silver outlines. Stone-like texture is replaced by a smooth, glassy sheen with subtle energy ripples distorting the air around its edges, and fist-like arms now have faint crimson mist seeping from rounded knuckles. The entire silhouette maintains its quadruped stance but seems to dissolve slightly at the periphery into thin, wispy shadows.
signature_feature: Hollow eye sockets: swirling deep violet mist with crimson mist eddies swirling inside.
